reviewReply.comment: It is unfortunate that we got to this point, we try to exceed our client’s expectations and offer excellent service each time. However, some people cannot be satisfied, even when we go above and beyond, as we did with you and accommodated last minute unplanned requests from you and gave you a huge discount on a 7hrs move. In return to our best effort to serve you, we were treated with abusive and disrespectful behavior. We will be filing the corresponding claim against you as an abusive and aggressive consumer. The workers have rights as well. Too bad the google system is unfair and on top of abusing our movers you want to damage our reputation and now have your friends writing more negative reviews.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyN0ozMHh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Panda Moving has been an excellent experience. They were very professional, hardworking, respectful, and detail-oriented, and everything was done on time and within the agreed-upon timeframe. From their arrival at the location where they picked up my furniture and boxes in Miami to their arrival in Pompano Beach, where they delivered my belongings, they were outstanding. I highly recommend them without hesitation.

Arturo C Guevara

(Original)
Panda Moving ha sido una excelente experiencia. Muy profesionales, trabajadores, respetuosos, detallistas  y todo dentro del servicio y el tiempo acordado. Desde su llegada al sitio desde donde fueron a buscar mis muebles y cajas  en Miami y hasta Pompano Beach, donde llevaron mis cosas. Los recomiendo ampliamente sin ningún tipo de dudas.
Arturo C Guevara.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por confiar en nosotros y por su amable comentario. Fue un placer servirle.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMWZERGpRRRAB

reviews.comment: I cannot say enough good things about this moving company! We were going to rent a Uhaul truck to drive up to Palm Coast, FL (about a 4hr drive from Miami) only to discover upon pick up that Uhaul would not allow us to leave the city of Miami with the Uhaul truck we reserved! We had to quickly find a solution. We called Rapid Panda Movers and spoke to Andy, the owner, who was not only professional and courteous, but also willing to accommodate us at last minute for the next-day. He quoted us a great rate for the 12 hours we needed. We were still a little hesitant and we were finally able to line up renting a long distance Penske truck - but at more than half the cost of RPM, and with RPM we would save 12 hours and not need to do any heavy lifting- we ultimately decided to go with RPM. BEST DECISION EVER!! Andy and his team were extremely punctual, meticulous and careful with all of our things, and personable. They were fantastic overall! They took all of the furniture to my aunt’s house in Palm Coast, and my aunt had an excellent experience with them - Andy and his team helped her arrange things in her home and assembled all the furniture for her. She loved them so much she asked if they could bring some of her furniture to my cousin’s house that lives by her for only $130 -right there and then Andy agreed and his team got to work on the second job! Over all Rapid Panda Movers impressed the entire family. I highly highly recommend and will be using them in the future! If you’re on the fence about who to use for your move - your search ends here!

reviewReply.comment: THANK YOU very much for that FANTASTIC REVIEW, now we give you a 5 stars for being so nice. Thanks you for trusting and being so kind to us.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMnZ6VUpREAE

reviews.comment: Andy was super responsive when I needed a last-minute long-distance mover. The team was incredibly fast at everything: packing the items that I hadn't been able to box myself, moving my belongings out of my apartment, driving to my new location, and dropping my belongings off in my new house. The cost of the move was also very transparent from the start.

reviews.comment: These guys ROCKED!!! They were fast but cautious, and moved a huge amount of my belongings in a short amount of time. Andy gave me a spot on quote, and his men even helped us load some items onto a separate trailer that was going to storage. These guys went above and beyond and I would definitely use them again in the future.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you very much Mike Hefty. We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to leave us such a wonderful review filled with kind words. You are always welcomed here, and we wish you all the best.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2LXFIamx3RRAB

reviews.comment:
The team at Rapid Panda Movers came highly recommended by the management at my new apartment.  Andy was really friendly and transparent about pricing during the quote.

On moving day the team pulled up promptly at 9am.  Their truck and equipment was clean and organized.  They wrapped and secured everything really well and followed all the instructions when they unloaded the truck at my new apartment.

Moving is a stressful process and using Rapid Panda Movers made for a smoother moving day experience.  I highly recommend Rapid Panda Movers and am definitely using them again.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your review Alex Texidor! Please don't forget to refer your family and friends for their moving needs!

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2blpqSnV3RRAB

reviews.comment: Andy and his crew are professionals. I immediately received an accurate quote with fair pricing. They showed up on time and got right to work. They were very delicate and caring of my belongings, wrapping things so they wouldn’t be scratched or damaged in the move. I would highly recommend to any family member or friend. Can’t say enough about how pleased I am that I chose them!!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you very much XR_T_strat 112. We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to leave us such a wonderful review filled with kind words. You are always welcomed here, and we wish you all the best.

reviews.comment: These guys did an outstanding job today. They came 15min early and got to work, all my stuff got wrapped in blue blankets and handled with care. I jus told them where I wanted everything there they put it. They disassembled all my furniture and put back together. Fair pricing for all the work they did…so Rapid Panda Highly recommended.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhMFBHV1N3EAE

reviewReply.comment: Thank you very much Geisabeth Castillo for your positive rating. We sincerely appreciate it.

reviews.comment: I don’t even know where to start. We found this company at the last minute for our recent move. They were very accommodating with the last minute booking changes, as our new building had very strict rules. Kara was super helpful with taking my calls and remained super kind and professional in spite of my changing needs.  Andy and another young man showed up to our home punctual and ready to move. They took exceptional car of our furniture, taking apart pieces to  make sure they stayed in tact during transport. We ran across a roadblock when my new building wouldn’t allow us to move in because of our arrival time. What was I supposed to do with my furniture?! Andy came up with a quick and safe solution that didn’t break my pockets as we would have to pay for storage overnight for my items. The next day they arrived at the new apartment to unload the furniture and were very swift and efficient. Throughout the whole process they were very professional and kind! They made me forget that I was stressing out the day prior. I would definitely use this company and I highly recommend them!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your review Lastena Shahid! Please don't forget to refer your family and friends for their moving needs!

reviewReply.comment: Your positive experience means the world to us Jay B, so we are very grateful and humble for the great testimonial, thank you very much.

reviews.comment:
This was far and away the most outstanding moving company that I have ever used. And I have moved 6 times with various large and small companies previously. Andy, the owner is a true professional, with extremely fair pricing.  His workers were of a quality and expertise that is rarely found in the moving industry, and they were able to move a very large spa across uneven and difficult terrain
- doing so in a very careful manner.  I recommend them to anyone that values their personal effects, because Andy and his team will treat your furnishings with the utmost care. Easily the best moving experience I have had.
Mike

reviewReply.comment: Very grateful for the kind words Mike. It helps us continue doing more moves, and please continue to recommend us to family and friends.
